arts.ttl: Difficult Middlesbrough spell for Lukas Engel ends with MLS switch, initially on loan
arts.sum: Engel’s exit comes after Boro secured the loan capture of Ryan Giles from Hull City last month. However, Boro confirmed the loan had gone through on Tuesday morning after Engel played Saturday's pre-season victory over Philadelphia Union as a trialist.

arts.ttl: Tommy Conway's goalscoring vow as he makes Middlesbrough return after Latte Lath exit
arts.sum: Conway enjoyed friendly competition with Latte Lath throughout the first half of the season and was on eight goals, with a better goals-per-minute ratio than the Ivorian when he suffered a hamstring injury on Boxing Day. In his absence, Latte Lath moved himself clear at the top of the scoring charts with 11 before departing in a club-record sale to MLS outfit Atlanta United. On how he hopes to contribute to a big end to the season for Boro though, Conway said: “I’m just doing as much as I can when I can.
